<tool_call>
<function=python>

# Check what changed after pressing the trigger
# Compare previous_frame to current_frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_lines = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    curr_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    
    changed_rows = []
    for r in range(len(prev_lines)):
        if prev_lines[r] != curr_lines[r]:
            changed_rows.append(r)
    
    print(f"Changed rows: {changed_rows}")
    for r in changed_rows:
        print(f"  Row {r}: '{curr_lines[r]}'")
    
    # Check T-shape position
    print("\nT-shape (c cells) in current frame:")
    for r in range(7, 31):
        row_str = curr_lines[r][6:31]
        if 'c' in row_str:
            c_positions = [i+6 for i, c in enumerate(row_str) if c == 'c']
            print(f"  Row {r}: c at cols {c_positions}")
else:
    print("No previous frame available")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

print(f"Blue objects: {len(blue_objects)}")

# Also find the box objects (gray borders with yellow inside)

for node in nodes:
    if node['boundary']:
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in node['boundary'])
